text: Dr Rawal Dental Centre | Dr Shipra Rawal | Best dentist near me | C-26, Arya Samaj Rd, Block C, Uttam Nagar, New Delhi, Delhi, 110059 top of page Home About Us Services Dental Implants Teeth Whitening / Bleaching Root Canal Crowns and Bridges Orthodontics (Braces Treatment) Pediatric Dentistry (Child Dentistry) Gum Treatment Dental Surgery Dentures and Partial Dentures Cosmetic Dentisry Benefits Meet the Doctor Certifications Testimonials Blog Dr Rawal Dental Centre Best Dentist in Uttam Nagar, West Delhi Advanced, ethical and patient-first dental care by Dr Shipra Rawal — trusted by families across West Delhi for over three decades. At Dr Rawal Dental Centre , dentistry is practised with experience, ethics, and empathy. Located in Uttam Nagar, West Delhi, the clinic provides comprehensive dental care focusing on accurate diagnosis, conservative treatment and long-term oral health. Dr Rawal Dental Centre | Dr Shipra Rawal Contact us About Dr Rawal Dental Centre Committed to Exceptional Dental Care Dr. Shipra Rawal completed her BDS from Pravara Dental Institute (Pune University) in 1995. She then started her own clinic in 1998 in Uttam nagar area of West Delhi, after working with a hospital and senior doctor in Delhi for almost 3 years to fine-tune her dental skills.With more than 20 years of experience, she is well recognized as the best dentist in Uttam Nagar Delhi She has a vast knowledge in field of cosmetic dentistry and complete smile makeovers with restoring missing teeth. Dr Shipra is also a certified dental implantologist and trained in dental implants by Osstem AIC South Korea. She is also a member of Indian Dental Association (IDA). She is also a life member of Indian Medical Association (IMA-Janakpuri). Sterilization protocol At Dr. Rawal Dental Centre, stringent sterilization measures are followed. Disposable gloves, facemasks and glasses are used. Only disposable syringes and needles are used. All our instruments used on patients are either disposed of or are properly cleaned in an ultrasonic cleaner, then disinfected or sterilized after use. Heat-sterilizing instruments in an autoclave or dry-heat sterilizer kills all potential disease-causing agents that might remain after patient treatment. All heat-stable instruments that are exposed to a patient's blood are processed in this manner, including the dental drill. Any instruments that cannot tolerate high temperatures are thoroughly cleaned and soaked in disinfectant chemicals. Instruments used for surgery, including tooth extraction, are heat sterilized and stored in a sterile wrap or container until they are used. We use an autoclaving machine, a dental sterilizer that processes instruments faster and more effectively than ever before. In autoclaving, instruments (which are first cleaned, dried, and placed in a special steam-penetrable wrap), are subjected to pressurized steam for 15 to 20 minutes. Types of Implants, instruments, equipments etc. used in our surgical procedures are sterilized and inspected before and after every procedure. Our Services Comprehensive Dental Solutions Dental Implants Dental implants are the most advanced, permanent solution to replace missing teeth—restoring function, preventing bone loss, and keeping your smile aligned. Teeth Whitening Teeth whitening is a quick, non-surgical way to brighten your natural smile by removing years of stains and boosting confidence. Root Canal Treatment Root canal treatment saves your natural tooth by removing infection from the pulp—safely and comfortably with advanced care at Dr. Rawal Dental Care Centre, Uttam Nagar. Crowns and Bridges Crowns and bridges restore damaged or missing teeth by strengthening your bite and bringing back a natural-looking smile. Orthodontics (Braces Treatment) Orthodontics (braces treatment) corrects misaligned teeth and jaws, giving you a healthier bite and a confident, well-aligned smile. Pediatric Dentistry (Child Dentistry) Pediatric dentistry (child dentistry) focuses on gentle, preventive dental care to keep your child’s smile healthy, strong, and cavity-free from an early age. Gum Treatment Gum treatment helps control infection, strengthen gums, and protect your teeth for long-term oral health. Teeth cleaning (scaling and polishing) Teeth cleaning (scaling and polishing) removes plaque and stains to keep your teeth healthy, gums strong, and smile fresh. Teeth Dentures and Partial Dentures Dentures and partial dentures replace missing teeth comfortably, restoring your smile, speech, and ability to chew with confidence. Dental Surgeries Dental surgeries provide safe, advanced solutions for complex dental problems, ensuring comfort, precision, and faster recovery. Cosmetic Dentistry/ Smile Makeover Transform Your Smile with Expert Cosmetic Dentistry at Dr. Rawal Dental Centre by Dr. Shipra Rawal Why Choose Dr Rawal Dental Centre Patient-First Approach At Dr Rawal Dental Centre , we prioritize patient well-being and offer personalized treatment plans to meet individual needs. Our team ensures patient comfort and safety at all times, providing reliable and compassionate support. Experienced Professionals Our dedicated team provides compassionate support and assistance, ensuring patients receive the care and attention they deserve. We focus on building strong relationships with our patients to promote trust and well-being. State-of-the-Art Care Our experienced team of dentists and hygienists deliver high-quality dental care services to meet oral health and cosmetic goals. We are dedicated to ensuring the best possible outcomes for our patients through expertise and commitment. Personalized Treatment We believe in a personalized approach to dental care, tailoring our services to the unique needs and preferences of each patient. Our goal is to empower patients to achieve a healthy and beautiful smile with the support and expertise they need. Meet Dr Shipra Rawal Committed to Your Oral Health Dr Shipra Rawal is one of the most trusted and experienced dentists in West Delhi with over 30 years of clinical practice. She is known for her calm demeanour, precise diagnosis, and ethical dental care. Her philosophy is simple: Do only what is medically necessary. Explain every step clearly. Treat patients with honesty and respect. She specialises in root canal treatments, dental implants, cosmetic and restorative dentistry, tooth extractions, and long-term dental maintenance. Patients visit her clinic from Uttam Nagar, Janakpuri, Vikaspuri, Dwarka, Nawada, and Mohan Garden for reliable dental solutions.
